narrative:
Woodville Township has 2,352 registered voters, with 51.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.2 percentage points.
